compiled_state.title: Add eval test cases for brainstorm non-epic type detection
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Add test cases to plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml:

1. Test case: given a non-epic ticket (story/task/bug) context, verify the skill presents convert-to-epic and enrich-in-place options rather than proceeding directly to Socratic dialogue
2. Update the prompt preamble to mention non-epic ticket type detection capability

TDD: test-exempt: static config — eval configuration YAML contains no conditional logic and no executable behavior; the promptfoo eval runner exercises the behavioral test at eval time. Criterion: static assets only (unit exemption criterion 3).

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] promptfooconfig.yaml contains a non-epic detection test case
  Verify: grep -q 'non-epic\|story.*ticket\|task.*ticket\|bug.*ticket' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Eval config is valid YAML
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml'))"
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — promptfooconfig.yaml uses llm-rubric assertions; SKILL.md has a Type Detection Gate that routes non-epic tickets (story/task/bug) to present convert-to-epic and enrich-in-place options
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — added non-epic detection test case and updated prompt preamble in promptfooconfig.yaml
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — YAML valid, AC1 grep matched 'non-epic' pattern, ruff check exit 0, ruff format --check exit 0
